ABOUT_SECTION_1_TEXT: Upon completing 29 years, Colibri is proud to have won the trust of all those with whom it relates. And, for good business to happen, trust is essential.
ABOUT_SECTION_2_TEXT: To innovate is necessary a lot of work, research and an environment that allows creation, invention and reinvention. Colibri has all this and more, as it constantly innovates to respond to the commitment to satisfy its customers.
ABOUT_SECTION_3_TITLE: For Colibri, quality is trust synonymous.
ABOUT_SECTION_3_TEXT_1: The entire process of elaboration and production of Colibri is rigorous and constantly evaluated. From the design made by creative hands, who study and transform the needs of the consuming public into beautiful decoration works, produced with raw material from renewable sources in a modern and well-equipped factory.
ABOUT_SECTION_3_TEXT_2: Everything we develop and produce carries the whimsy, dedication and know-how of almost 30 years, which make Colibri a reference into the furniture market. That is why we believe that quality is trust  synonymous.
